SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: CHARTER FUND, INC (THE "FUND") PRIMARILY PROVIDES GRANTS AND LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS WHICH MANAGE AND GROW NETWORKS OF SCHOOLS. THE FUNDS ONLY SUPPORT ORGANIZATIONS WHICH CAN DEMONSTRATE AN IMPACT ON UNDERSERVED STUDENT POPULATIONS AND OUTSTANDING VALUE ADDED ACADEMIC GAINS. THE FUND FOCUSES ON GEOGRAPHIC AREAS SUPPORTIVE OF FURTHER EXPANSION OF CHARTER SCHOOLS. THE FUND DISTRIBUTED $ 54,306,339 OF GRANTS TO OR FOR THE BENEFIT OR CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS AND INCURRED ADDITIONAL CHARITABLE EXPENSES OF $ 14,398,452 DURING THE CALENDAR YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2019. IN ADDITION, THE FUND ISSUED $13,520,000 OF LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS DURING THE CALENDAR YEAR ENDING DECEMBER 31, 2019. SEE PART IX-B AND XV FOR A DETAILED LISTING OF LOANS AND GRANTS DURING THE CURRENT YEAR.

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: PRI LOAN TO KIPP BAY AREA SCHOOLS TO SUPPORT CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH
SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description2Txt: PRI EQUITY INVESTMENT TO OVERGRAD INC. TO SERVE A NEED AT SCHOOLS WITH LARGE NUMBERS OF LOW-INCOME STUDENTS IN PROVIDING BETTER TOOLS AND INFORMATION SO THAT STUDENTS, FAMILIES AND COUNSELORS CAN MAKE INFORMED DECISIONS ABOUT THEIR POST-SECONDARY PATH. OVERGRAD'S CORE PRODUCT MAKES IT SIMPLE FOR STUDENTS, FAMILIES AND COUNSELORS TO SEARCH FOR COLLEGES, ASSESS ODDS OF ADMISSION, UNDERSTAND PERSONALIZED CHANGES OF GRADUATING FROM SPECIFIC COLLEGES, AND MANAGE THE COLLEGE APPLICATION AND FINANCIAL AID PROCESS.

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND APPLICATIONS SHOULD BE SUBMITTED ONLINE AT WWW.CHARTERGROWTHFUND.ORG
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: CHARTER FUND, INC (THE "FUND") PRIMARILY PROVIDES GRANTS AND LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS THAT MANAGE AND GROW NETWORKS OF SCHOOLS. THE FUNDS ONLY SUPPORT ORGANIZATIONS WHICH CAN DEMONSTRATE AN IMPACT ON UNDERSERVED STUDENT POPULATIONS AND OUTSTANDING VALUE ADDED ACADEMIC GAINS. THE FUND FOCUSES ON GEOGRAPHIC AREAS SUPPORTIVE OF FURTHER EXPANSION OF CHARTER SCHOOLS.

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: PRI EQUITY INVESTMENT TO OVERGRAD INC. TO SERVE A NEED AT SCHOOLS WITH LARGE NUMBERS OF LOW-INCOME STUDENTS IN PROVIDING BETTER TOOLS AND INFORMATION SO THAT STUDENTS, FAMILIES AND COUNSELORS CAN MAKE INFORMED DECISIONS ABOUT THEIR POST-SECONDARY PATH. OVERGRAD'S CORE PRODUCT MAKES IT SIMPLE FOR STUDENTS, FAMILIES AND COUNSELORS TO SEARCH FOR COLLEGES, ASSESS ODDS OF ADMISSION, UNDERSTAND PERSONALIZED CHANGES OF GRADUATING FROM SPECIFIC COLLEGES, AND MANAGE THE COLLEGE APPLICATION AND FINANCIAL AID PROCESS.

GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: DURING THE YEAR, DISQUALIFIED PERSONS INADVERTENTLY USED THE FOUNDATION CREDIT CARD FOR PERSONAL EXPENDITURES. THE TOTAL AMOUNT FOR 2019 WAS $296. THE AMOUNTS WERE REPAID TO THE FOUNDATION IN A TIMELY MANNER. SINCE THE TRANSACTION IS FOR THE USE OF MONEY, SELF-DEALING IS ON THE GREATER OF THE AMOUNT PAID FOR SUCH USE OR THE FAIR MARKET VALUE OF SUCH USE FOR THE PERIOD FOR WHICH THE MONEY IS USED (REG. 53.4941(E)-1(B)(2)(II)). NO INTEREST WAS CHARGED BY THE FOUNDATION FOR THESE FUNDS, THEREFORE THE 2019 SHORT TERM AFR RATES FOR THE APPLICABLE MONTHS HAVE BEEN USED TO CALCULATE THE AMOUNT INVOLVED FOR SELF-DEALING PURPOSES.DUE TO THE AMOUNTS BEING SMALL, THE BALANCES OUTSTANDING FOR A SHORT NUMBER OF DAYS, AND THE AFR RATES BEING LOW, THE AMOUNT INVOLVED IS ZERO WHEN ROUNDED TO THE NEAREST DOLLAR. THEREFORE, THE SELF-DEALING TAXES CALCULATED FOR THESE TRANSACTIONS IS ZERO. AS A RESULT, NO FORM 4720 HAS BEEN FILED.THE DISQUALIFIED PERSONS UNDERSTAND SUCH TRANSACTIONS MADE BY THE FOUNDATION ARE IMPERMISSIBLE. PROCEDURES HAVE BEEN IMPLEMENTED THAT ARE DESIGNED TO AVOID SUCH TRANSACTIONS IN THE FUTURE.

InvestmentsCorporateBondsGrp.BondNm: BAIRD SHORT-TERM BOND FUND CLASS INSTITUTIONAL
